news.t: First Trust Announces Upcoming CUSIP Change for FT Confluence BDC & Specialty Finance ETF
First Trust Announces a 1-for-5 Reverse Share Split for FT Confluence BDC & Specialty Finance ETF

holdings.infoBox: FBDC is an equity ETF with a total of 22 individual holdings. The top holdings are Main Street Capital stock at 11.80%, Hercules Capital at 10.68%, Ares Capital at 10.45%, Golub Capital BDC at 9.34%, and Blackstone Secured Lending Fund at 8.28%.

overview.description: The FT Confluence BDC & Specialty Finance Income ETF (FBDC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in US-listed equity securities of business development companies (BDCs) and other specialty finance companies the sub-adviser believes offer attractive opportunities for income and capital appreciation. FBDC was launched on Mar 20, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.
